channel.title: Blog on Paulo H. Barchi
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Paulo H. Barchi

item.title: AI Engineering: A Comprehensive Study Guide
item.description: A high-level reference for AI Engineering, covering RAG, Agentic Systems, MCP, Evaluation Harnesses, and Production Prompt Engineering.

item.title: Six Perspectives on the Ocean of Consciousness
item.description: Matter emerges from consciousness, not the other way around: exploring six different perspectives.

item.title: My Big TOE: 12 Core Diagrams
item.description: A visual summary of Thomas Campbell’s Theory of Everything, exploring the evolution of consciousness, the nature of reality as a simulation, and the path to entropy reduction.

item.title: MLOps Thoughts - 5W1H
item.description: Thoughts on Machine Learning Ops - Why, What, Where, Who, When, How
